title: 6.3: PranaStream Order Book Frames
description: Create OrderBookFrame DTO (type:orderbook.depth, key:exchange:symbol, bids/asks arrays, spread, midPrice, ts, v:1). Add publishOrderBook() to RealtimeAggregatorService computing spread+midPrice from best bid/ask. Update prana-stream.gateway.ts to handle orderbook channel subscriptions. PranaStream subscribe() routes orderbook channel to orderbook:{exchange}:{symbol} keys. Plan: Task 6.3

title: 6.2: Outbox → Settlement Job Automation
description: Create SettlementOutboxHandler handling settlement.job.create outbox messages. In OrderService.addExecution(), call outboxService.append() after execution persists. Wire handler in OutboxWorkerSkeleton. Use SettlementService.getSettlementDate() for T+N (CRYPTO=T+0, FOREX=T+1, EQUITY=T+2). Plan: Task 6.2

title: 6.1: OrderBookService + Order Book Controller
description: Create order-book module: OrderBookService.updateBook() + getDepth(levels) + getSpread(). GET /order-book/:exchange/:symbol with depth levels query param. Wire updates from market data adapters (kite, generic-rest). publishOrderBook() in RealtimeAggregatorService. Plan: Task 6.1

title: 5.2: IBKR + Binance Connectors
description: Create IBKRConnector (US_EQUITIES_OPTIONS family): place/modify/cancel/getPositions via IB API wrapper. Create BinanceConnector (CRYPTO_CEX family): REST API place/cancel. Both extend BaseExecutionConnector. Register in ExecutionGatewayService. Write contract tests for both. Plan: Task 5.2

title: 5.1: SmartOrderRouter + VenueScorer
description: Create execution-intelligence module. SmartOrderRouter.route() tries venues in scored order, fallback to last venue. VenueScorerService.rank() with weighted scoring: liquidity 40%, latency 25%, spread 20%, fee 15%. SlippageTrackerService.record() + getVenueScores(). Wire into ExecutionGatewayService. Plan: Task 5.1

title: 4.1: Risk Engine Module Scaffold
description: Create risk-engine module: RiskThresholdEntity (metric, operator GT/LT/GTE/LTE/EQ, thresholdValue, action ALERT/FREEZE/LIQUIDATE_ALL/LIQUIDATE_BIGGEST), RiskEngineService.validateOrder(), RealTimeExposureService (cache Map, onExecutionAdded), GreeksCalculatorService (normalCDF for options delta/gamma), AutoLiquidationWorker (cron 30s, marginLevel<75=liquidate all, <100=liquidate biggest), CircuitBreakerService (upper/lower limits per instrument). Wire into OrderService. Plan: Task 4.1

title: 3.3: B-Book Fill Service + OrderService B-Book Routing
description: Create BrokerBookStrategyService.getBookStrategy() (A_ONLY/B_PREFERRED/B_REQUIRED per exchange). Create BBookFillService.fillBBook(): mark order FILLED, update strategy position with bookType=B, compute broker spread (5bps markup), credit/debit broker P&L via ledgerService.postCash(). Update OrderService.place() to branch on B-book. Add admin B-book positions endpoint. Plan: Task 3.3

title: 3.2: StrategyPositionService (FIFO P&L)
description: Implement StrategyPositionService with updateFromExecution() using FIFO: opening position (netQty=0), closing (netQty flips sign), reversing (partial close + reopen). Realized P&L = closeQty × (execPrice - avgCost) × direction. Weighted average cost on partial adds. computeUnrealized() via price feed. listByAccount(). Separate A-book and B-book via bookType field. Plan: Task 3.2

title: 3.1: StrategyPositionEntity Migration
description: Create strategy_positions table: id, tenant_id, account_id, instrument_id (nullable for multi-leg), strategy_type, net_quantity, average_price, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, delta, gamma, book_type (A/B), meta, timestamps. Indexes on (tenant_id, account_id), instrument_id (partial), book_type. Plan: Task 3.1

title: 2.2: Algo Order Worker (TWAP + VWAP + Iceberg)
description: Create AlgoOrderWorker (Cron every 10s). computeTwapSlices() for equal slice generation. dispatchNextSlice() creates child orders with parentOrderId set. recordChildFill() updates parent filledQty/remainingQty, transitions to FILLED when remainingQty=0. Create PlaceAlgoOrderDto. Wire into addExecution() for child fill tracking. Plan: Task 2.2

title: 2.1: Conditional Order Worker (GTT + Trailing Stop)
description: Create ConditionalOrderWorker (Cron every 5s). evaluateCondition() for GTT triggers ABOVE/BELOW with expiry check. recomputeTrailingStop() for BUY (trail UP) and SELL (trail DOWN) on price ticks. triggerOrder() converts GTT→LIMIT and submits to exchange. expireOrder() marks EXPIRED. Wire onPriceTick() from PriceFeedService. Plan: Task 2.1

title: 1.6: OMS Module Update + MODULE_DOC Changelog
description: Register ConditionalOrderWorker and AlgoOrderWorker in OmsModule (add ScheduleModule). Update MODULE_DOC.md changelog with Phase 1+2 additions: bracket orders, parent-child links, conditional/GTT workers, trailing stop, TWAP/VWAP/Iceberg child generation, remainingQty tracking. Plan: Task 1.6

title: 1.5: List Children Endpoint + GraphQL Resolver Update
description: Add GET /orders/:orderId/children REST endpoint in orders.controller.ts. Update oms.resolver.ts with bracketChildren GraphQL query. Children have parentOrderId set to PRIMARY id. All children inherit tenantId+accountId from parent. Order by createdAt ASC.

title: 1.4: OrderService — placeBracket + bracket activation + remainingQty
description: Implement placeBracket() in one DB transaction: create PRIMARY + TAKE_PROFIT + STOP_LOSS atomically, validate bracket prices, create holds for all. Implement activateBracketChildren() when entry fills (remainingQty=0). Implement cancelBracketChildren() for parent cancel. Update addExecution() to track filledQty/remainingQty. Wire into risk engine.

title: 1.3: Bracket Order DTOs + Controller Endpoint
description: Create PlaceBracketOrderDto extending PlaceOrderDto with BracketConfigDto (takeProfitPrice, stopLossPrice, trailingDistance, trailingPct, trailingActivation). Add POST /orders/bracket endpoint. Write Zod validation tests: BUY requires TP>entry+SL<entry; SELL requires reverse. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-24-trading-book-implementation.md Task 1.3

title: 1.2: OrderEntity — Add New Fields
description: Extend OrderEntity TypeScript class with new fields: parentOrderId (uuid nullable), orderRole (PRIMARY/TAKE_PROFIT/STOP_LOSS nullable), triggerPrice, triggerCondition (ABOVE/BELOW), trailingDistance, trailingPct, filledQty, remainingQty, algoType (TWAP/VWAP/ICEBERG), algoMeta. Update status enum to include EXPIRED. All fields nullable/optional except filledQty and remainingQty.

title: 1.1: Database Migration — Extend Orders Table
description: Add nullable columns to orders table: parent_order_id, order_role, trigger_price, trigger_condition, trailing_dist, trailing_pct, filled_qty, remaining_qty, algo_type, algo_meta. Backfill existing FILLED/CANCELLED orders with filledQty=quantity, remainingQty=0. Indexes on parent_order_id and order_role. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-24-trading-book-implementation.md
